product_overview: Dehon AI is a specialized RAG system for the documentary corpus of Padre Leão Dehon, designed to deliver academically rigorous answers with traceable citations and a research-oriented experience similar to NotebookLM. The frontend provides a conversational interface with scope-based retrieval, while the underlying system emphasizes hybrid search, multilingual handling, and source authority.
core_goals: Provide accurate, academically grounded answers from the Padre Leão Dehon corpus
Support hybrid retrieval that combines vector and lexical search for better relevance
Allow users to filter results by scope and document metadata such as sigla and recipient
Render answers with anchored citations and source metadata for traceability
Handle multilingual source material, including translation and commentary when needed
Fail transparently when evidence is insufficient in the selected scope

features.name: Conversational RAG Interface
features.description: A chat-based interface for asking questions over the Dehon corpus and receiving cited, research-style answers.
user_flows: GET /api/dummy -> Receive 200 with a dummy string -> Open chat interface and submit a research question with scope context
GET /api/dummy -> Receive 200 with a dummy string -> Submit an invalid or unsupported request context and receive an error response or no usable backend result
